ObjectStates.Name: Notecard
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
colors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey', 'Black'} -- all player colors
font_colors = { -- font color for colored player buttons
		['White'] = 'Black',
		['Brown'] = 'White',
		['Red'] = 'White',
		['Orange'] = 'White',
		['Yellow'] = 'Black',
		['Green'] = 'White',
		['Teal'] = 'White',
		['Blue'] = 'White',
		['Purple'] = 'White',
		['Pink'] = 'White',
		['Grey'] = 'White',
		['Black'] = 'White'
	}
targetplayer = nil -- the player selected for a color change
players = {} -- a list of the players
promote = false -- if true, promoted players can promote players. if false, only the host can promote players

--[[ onload function - sets the name and descript on the card so you don't have the default text all over it, and calls createButtons function --]]
function onload()
    self.setName('[sup]Admin Helper by Skor')
    self.setDescription('')
    createButtons()
end

--[[ Check for change in size of player list and refresh buttons if there is a change. This enables auto-update of buttons when a player joins the game into grey, or leaves game from grey --]]
function update()
    if #players ~= #Player.getPlayers() then
        createButtons()
    end
end

--[[ Clears buttons on the notecard then recreates them --]]
function createButtons(ob, pl)
	if pl then
		if not Player[pl].admin then return 0 end
	end
    players = Player.getPlayers()
    self.clearButtons()
    local button = {}
    for i, v in ipairs (players) do
        button.label = string.sub(v.steam_name, 1, 10)
        button.color = toRGB(v.color)
        button.font_color = toRGB(font_colors[v.color])
        button.width = 1000
        button.height = 200
        button.font_size = 180
        button.position = {0.335, 3, 0.38 - (i/11.925)}
        button.rotation = {0, 180, 0}
        button.scale = {0.15, 0.15, 0.2}
        button.click_function = 'createButtons'
        button.function_owner = self
        self.createButton(button)
        
        button.width = 200
        button.label = '♪'
        button.color = {1, 1, 1}
        button.font_color = {0, 0, 0}
        button.position = {-0.025, 3, 0.38 - (i/11.925)}
        button.click_function = 'mutePlayer'..i
        self.createButton(button)
		
        button.label = 'ｘ'
        button.position = {-0.1, 3, 0.38 - (i/11.925)}
        button.click_function = 'kickPlayer'..i
        self.createButton(button)

		button.label = '[sub]◉◉'
		button.position = {0.05, 3, 0.38 - (i/11.925)}
		button.font_color = {0, 0, 0}
		if not v.blindfolded then 
			button.color = {1, 1, 1}
		else
			button.color = {0, 0, 0}
		end
		button.click_function = 'blindfoldPlayer'..i
		self.createButton(button)
		
        button.label = isTargetPlayer(v)
        button.color = toRGB(v.color)
        button.font_color = {0, 0, 0}
        button.click_function = 'setTargetPlayer'..i
        button.position = {-0.175, 3, 0.38 - (i/11.925)}
        self.createButton(button)
		
		button.label = '♕'
		button.font_size = 150
		if v.host then
			button.color = {0, 0, 0}
			button.font_color = {1, 1, 1}
		elseif v.promoted then
			button.color = {0, 1, 0.2}
			button.font_color = {0, 0, 0}
		else
			button.color = {1, 1, 1}
			button.font_color = {0, 0, 0}
		end
		button.position = {0.125, 3, 0.38 - (i/11.925)}
		button.click_function = 'promotePlayer'..i
		self.createButton(button)
    end
	if promote then button.label = '✔' else button.label = '' end
	button.color = {1, 1, 1}
	button.font_color = {0, 0, 0}
	button.click_function = 'togglePromote'
	button.position = {0.125, 3, 0.38}
	self.createButton(button)

    if targetplayer then
        local x = 0
        for i, v in ipairs (colors) do
            if not objectExistsInList(getSeatedPlayers(), v) then
                button.label = ''
                button.color = toRGB(v)
                button.click_function = 'playerTo'..v
                button.position = {-0.3 - ((x % 2)/10), 3, 0.38 - (math.floor((x+2)/2)/11.925)}
                button.width = 200
                button.height = 200
                self.createButton(button)
                x = x+1
            end
        end
    end
end

--[[ Returns rgb color table of a player color. --]]

function toRGB(color)
	local color_tables = {
		['White'] = {1, 1, 1}, 
		['Brown'] = {0.443, 0.231, 0.09}, 
		['Red'] = {0.856, 0.1, 0.094}, 
		['Orange'] = {0.956, 0.392, 0.113}, 
		['Yellow'] = {0.905, 0.898, 0.172}, 
		['Green'] = {0.192, 0.701, 0.168}, 
		['Teal'] = {0.129, 0.694, 0.607}, 
		['Blue'] = {0.118, 0.53, 1}, 
		['Purple'] = {0.627, 0.125, 0.941}, 
		['Pink'] = {0.96, 0.439, 0.807}, 
		['Grey'] = {0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, 
		['Black'] = {0.25, 0.25, 0.25}
	}
	return color_tables[color]
end

function isTargetPlayer(pl)
    if targetplayer then
        if targetplayer.steam_id == pl.steam_id then return '      >' else return '' end
    else
        return ''
    end
end

function doNothing()
end

function blindfoldPlayer1(ob, pl)
	if not Player[pl].admin then return 0 end
	players[1].blindfolded = not players[1].blindfolded
	createButtons()
end

function kickPlayer1(ob, pl)
    if not Player[pl].admin then return 0 end
	if Player[pl].steam_id == players[1].steam_id then 
		broadcastToColor('You can\'t kick yourself.', pl, {1, 0.1, 0.1}) 
		return 0
	end
    players[1].kick()
end

	if not Player[pl].admin then return 0 end
	if not Player[pl].host and not promote then return 0 end
	players[1].promote()
	createButtons()

function setTargetPlayer1(ob, pl)
    if not Player[pl].admin then return 0 end
	if targetplayer then
		if targetplayer.steam_id == players[1].steam_id then
			targetplayer = nil
		else
			targetplayer = players[1]
		end
	else
		targetplayer = players[1]	
	end
    createButtons()
end

function playerToWhite(ob, pl)
    if not Player[pl].admin then return 0 end
    targetplayer.changeColor('White')
end

function togglePromote(ob, pl)
	if not Player[pl].host then return 0 end
	promote = not promote
	createButtons()
end

function onPlayerChangeColor()
    targetplayer = nil
	createButtons()
end

function objectExistsInList(list, object)
    for i, v in ipairs(list) do
        if v == object then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end
